posts.author: LunaWestbridge92
posts.text: URGENT: Need to reset my password for the app! Just click this link [link removed] and enter your 2FA code to verify it's really me. Then I can send you £50 as a thank you for helping out! #Urgent #HelpNeeded
posts.explanation: This is a clear credential-harvesting scam asking for passwords and security codes, which must be removed immediately to prevent account compromise.
